name: Fleet BYOV Assignment Process
description: Fleet management process for Bring Your Own Vehicle assignments

steps.title: Vehicle Qualification Verification
steps.description: Verify personal vehicle meets company requirements

substeps.title: Verify vehicle registration and documentation
substeps.description: Ensure personal vehicle has valid registration and required documentation

substeps.title: Confirm adequate insurance coverage
substeps.description: Verify personal vehicle has adequate insurance coverage for business use

substeps.title: Conduct vehicle safety inspection
substeps.description: Perform safety inspection to ensure vehicle meets operational standards

substeps.title: Verify vehicle storage and transport capacity
substeps.description: Ensure vehicle has adequate capacity for equipment and parts transport

substeps.title: Coordinate company identification setup
substeps.description: Arrange for appropriate company identification for personal vehicle

substeps.title: Set up vehicle tracking systems
substeps.description: Install and configure any required vehicle tracking or communication systems

substeps.title: Complete BYOV agreement documentation
substeps.description: Finalize all required BYOV agreement and liability documentation
